criteria: Plan tree structure implemented with base PlanNode and recursive pretty_print functionality.
Strict separation between Logical operators (Scan, Filter, Join, Project, Aggregate) and Physical operators (SeqScan, IndexScan, HashJoin, etc.).
Plan nodes include fields for estimated_rows and estimated_cost initialized to 0.0.
Catalog class implemented to store and retrieve TableMetadata by table name.
ColumnStats class implements build_histogram using the equi-depth algorithm with configurable bucket counts.
ANALYZE implementation correctly calculates total row count, null fraction, and distinct value count for a given table dataset.
Histogram boundaries accurately reflect percentiles of the data distribution, verified with skewed test data.
Pretty-printer outputs a human-readable tree showing operator type and current cost/cardinality annotations.
Implement a CostModel class with configurable weights for I/O (default 1.0) and CPU (default 0.01).
Implement estimate_seq_scan(pages, rows) using the weighted sum formula.
Implement estimate_index_scan(selectivity, pages, rows, height) that accounts for index traversal cost and selectivity-based reduction.
Implement estimate_filter() for equality predicates using NDV (if available) or 1/num_buckets logic.
Implement estimate_filter() for range predicates ('>', '<', '>=', '<=') using histogram boundary lookup and linear interpolation.
Implement compound predicate selectivity using the Independence Assumption (multiplication for AND, sum-minus-intersection for OR).
Implement Join Cardinality estimation using the formula: (RowsA * RowsB) / max(DistinctA, DistinctB).
Ensure all cardinality estimates have a 'floor' of at least 1.0 row to prevent zero-cardinality optimization errors.
Provide a test case verifying that estimated row counts are within a 2x margin for a range filter on a column with a known equi-depth histogram.
Implement a LogicalPlan tree structure with Filter, Join, Project, and Scan nodes.
Implement ConstantFoldingRule that simplifies arithmetic and boolean expressions (e.g., 1+1 -> 2, true AND x -> x).
Implement PredicatePushdownRule that correctly identifies which side of a join a filter belongs to and moves it below the Join node.
Implement ProjectionPruningRule that tracks 'required columns' from the root to the leaves and removes unused columns from Scan and Join nodes.
Implement a RuleEngine that uses Fixed-Point Iteration to apply rules until the plan tree stabilizes.
Ensure PredicatePushdownRule handles complex predicates by splitting AND-connected conditions into individual pushable filters.
Verify Semantic Preservation: The optimized logical plan must logically represent the same result set as the original AST.
Verify that the total estimated cost of a plan (using the Milestone 2 model) is lower after applying RBO rules for a multi-table join with filters.
Prevent infinite loops in the RuleEngine by implementing a maximum iteration cap.
DP search correctly enumerates all 2^N - 1 subsets for at least 4 tables
Memoization prevents redundant cost calculations for identical table subsets
Optimizer distinguishes between Left-Deep and Bushy trees (or strictly enforces Left-Deep via configuration)
Join algorithm selection (NLJ vs Hash vs Merge) is driven by the cost model from M2
IndexScan is selected over SeqScan when selectivity is below the 15% threshold
Cross-products are penalized with a cost multiplier of at least 100x
The final plan includes a calculated Total Cost which is the sum of all operator costs
The system successfully falls back to a Greedy heuristic when N > 10 tables
A test case demonstrates that the optimizer chooses a different join order when table statistics are significantly changed
PlanNode has children and stats properties
Logical and Physical operators are separate classes
Pretty-printer produces indented tree output
ANALYZE command calculates row count, NDV, and null fraction
Equi-depth histogram logic correctly handles skewed data and identical boundaries
Catalog supports JSON-based persistence and retrieval
Reservoir sampling (optional) or full-scan sampling is implemented for statistics collection
Implement linear interpolation for range predicates using equi-depth histograms.
Apply the independence assumption for AND/OR compound predicates.
Implement the equi-join cardinality formula using Max(NDV_L, NDV_R).
Provide a cost model with weighted I/O and CPU components.
Ensure estimated cardinality never drops below 1.0.
Perform plan costing using a bottom-up (post-order) tree traversal.
RuleEngine must implement fixed-point iteration with a safety limit of 100 iterations.
PredicatePushdown must move filters referencing only one side of a join below that join node.
ProjectionPruning must eliminate columns not required by upstream operators including SELECT, JOIN ON, and WHERE clauses.
ConstantFolding must evaluate arithmetic and logical expressions with literal-only operands at optimization time.
Schema resolution must accurately track column provenance through Joins and Projections.
RuleEngine must detect and prevent infinite loops via the max_iterations threshold.
DPTable correctly implements memoization for table subsets
Selinger DP supports both left-deep and bushy tree enumeration
Greedy fallback triggers correctly for queries with > 12 tables
Cross-product penalty of 1000x is applied to disconnected join paths
Interesting Orders (sort properties) are preserved in the memoization table
Physical operator selection includes HashJoin, NLJoin, and SortMergeJoin
